labels.description: Recovery or staging pool with low gradient and lower velocity.
labels.label: pool

labels.description: Shallow rough water with small waves and moderate roughness.
labels.label: riffle

labels.description: Series of standing waves aligned with the main tongue.
labels.label: wave_train

labels.description: Recirculating hydraulic or keeper-like feature needing raft interaction tuning.
labels.label: hole

labels.description: Abrupt bed drop or shelf that can form a hydraulic or lateral wave.
labels.label: ledge

labels.description: Sideways wave or current crossing the main current.
labels.label: lateral

labels.description: Circulating slack/current reversal area useful for recovery or route choice.
labels.label: eddy

labels.description: High shear boundary between main current and eddy circulation.
labels.label: eddy_line

labels.description: Tree, debris, sieve, or brush hazard that should be avoided.
labels.label: strainer

labels.description: Feature or reach that should support scout/portage gameplay and safety warnings.
labels.label: portage

labels.description: Put-in, take-out, trail, road, or scout access.
labels.label: access_point

labels.description: Cluster of exposed or submerged rocks that drives roughness and collision hazards.
labels.label: boulder_garden

labels.description: Narrowed channel that accelerates flow and can produce stronger waves or holes.
labels.label: constriction
